title: Unique Party 19974-White & Glitter Spiral Birthday Candles, Pack of 24, White,6 centimeters
features: Pack of 24 White & Glitter Spiral Birthday Candles
Great for any birthday party or milestone celebration
Quick and easy way to decorate any type of cake
Combine with other birthday party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Put a fun twist on a birthday classic with these White & Glitter spiral birthday candles. Featuring a cool spiral design and sparkly finish, these cake candles are ready to add charming style to any birthday party. Use them to instantly spruce up your celebration cake, whether it’s a traditional birthday cake or a batch of cupcakes. Safety Warning For safe use, keep away from flammable materials, do not leave unattended while lit, monitor during use, and dispose of properly.

specifications_table.Material Care Instructions: ‎Cut the fuse to the appropriate length before each use and keep the area around the candle clean to reduce the risk of fire
